## Summary

Add **accessibility (a11y) improvements** to the ZCore dapp auth and dashboard flows — WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for wallet connect, forms, and score displays.

---

## Background

The dapp uses shadcn/ui + Radix primitives (good foundation) but lacks systematic a11y audit. Wallet auth relies on popup flows that screen reader users may struggle with. GrantFox / OSS campaigns increasingly expect accessible public goods.

---

## Scope (v1 pages)

| Page / Component | Checks |
|------------------|--------|
| `/login`, `/register` | Focus order, label associations, error announcements |
| `wallet-auth-card.tsx` | `aria-live` for auth errors (#54) |
| `dashboard/page.tsx` | Score readable by screen readers |
| `dapp-shell.tsx` | Skip navigation link, landmark regions |
| `connect-wallet-button.tsx` | Accessible name, keyboard operable |

---

## Implementation checklist

- [ ] Run `axe-core` or Lighthouse a11y audit — document baseline score
- [ ] All interactive elements keyboard-focusable
- [ ] Color contrast ≥ 4.5:1 on tier badges and alerts (ZK monochrome theme #10)
- [ ] `aria-live="polite"` on auth error alerts
- [ ] Form inputs linked to labels (`htmlFor` / `id`)
- [ ] Images have alt text (`zcore-logo.tsx`)
- [ ] Focus trap in wallet connect modal (if applicable)

**CI (optional):**
```yaml
- name: a11y audit
  run: npx pa11y-ci http://localhost:3001/login
```

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Lighthouse accessibility score ≥ 90 on login + dashboard
- [ ] Zero critical axe violations on scoped pages
- [ ] Document a11y guidelines in CONTRIBUTING
- [ ] Skip-to-content link visible on keyboard focus

---

## Related

- #10 dapp design system
- #54 user-friendly error messages (`aria-live`)
- #40 i18n (lang attribute on `<html>`)

---

## Out of scope

- Full WCAG audit of landing (separate repo)
- Voice control optimization
